subcodes.first_line: O Faraj! The relief hath come, while the people remain in manifest doubt. He Who was promised in the Books of God hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فرج قد اتی الفرج و الناس فی ریب مبین قد اتی من کان موعودا فی کتب الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
